title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0488
summary: Moses N @ Moses, along with his sister and mother, were accused under IPC Sections 354C, 354D and IT Act Sections 66, 66C, 66E, and 67A based on a private complaint filed by his wife. The complaint followed an earlier FIR under IPC Section 498A and Dowry Prohibition Act Sections 3 and 4.
